channel.title: GNmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After Hiker Falls From Cliff, Dog is Left Behind Shivering Until Pilot Crowdfunds for Rescue Flight to Reunite Them
item.description: Jessica Johnston was lucky to have survived after plummeting from the top of a 180-foot waterfall while hiking in the mountains. But when she lost her...

item.title: 10 'coolest' vacation spots to escape the heat this summer
item.description: Whether you want to hike, ski or eat your way through top restaurants, here are 10 of the best destinations to escape the heat this summer.

item.title: Alaska Airlines airport lounges: How to get access to this VIP space
item.description: Learn how to access Alaska Airlines lounges in 2026, including by paying for a membership and having the right credit card.

item.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
item.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

item.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
item.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.

item.title: Apple’s Next Chapter, SpaceX and Cursor Strike a Deal, and Palantir’s Controversial Manifesto
item.description: In this week’s episode of Uncanny Valley, we talk about Tim Cook’s legacy as CEO at Apple and what his long-rumored departure means for the future of ...

item.title: Lume Cube Edge Light Go Review (2026): Versatile, Portable
item.description: Portable lamps are rarely, if ever, as powerful, precise, and multipurpose as the Lume Cube Edge Light Go.

item.title: Could a jet fuel shortage really ruin your summer trip to Europe? What flyers should know
item.description: Concerns over a growing shortage of jet fuel on the continent have raised fears about potential flight cancellations if things don’t improve.

item.title: Seeds Can ‘Hear’ the Rain–And the Sound Waves Make Them Grow Faster Shows MIT Study
item.description: Seeds may come alive to the soothing sound of rainfall, sensing the drops while they are still beneath the surface, suggests a new study. A series of ...

item.title: At 'AI Coachella,' Stanford Students Line Up to Learn From Silicon Valley Royalty
item.description: CS 153 has gone viral on the Palo Alto campus—and on X. Not everyone is happy about it.

item.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
item.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with upgraded business class debuts on flight to LAX
item.description: Lufthansa's first Airbus A380 with a new business class cabin entered service on Thursday flying between Munich and Los Angeles.

item.title: Don’t stop hiring humans — stop hiring the wrong humans, Artisan’s founder says
item.description: Artisan may be known for their bold “Stop Hiring Humans” campaign but the reality is every founder needs to assemble the right team if they want to sc...

item.title: Good News in History, April 23
item.description: 112 years ago today, the first-ever baseball game was played at Wrigley Field in Chicago. Then known as Weeghman Park, its original occupants were the...

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: 250 Millionth Tree Planted! Eco-Loving Search Engine Ecosia Hits Milestone For Earth Day
item.description: Reaching a stellar milestone just before Earth Day, Ecosia, the nonprofit search engine, is celebrating 250 million trees planted worldwide, becoming ...

item.title: 8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need
OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
item.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

item.title: These New Smart Glasses From Ex-OnePlus Engineers Have a Hidden Cost
item.description: The Kickstarter-funded glasses from L'Atitude 52°N have AI features bundled for 1 year, but the company doesn't know yet how much it will charge for a...
